rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"The reported bug may already be fixed; always verify the actual file state before generating a plan or making changes.","scope":"src/utils/helpers.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Kody config (kody.config.json) defines quality commands (typecheck, lint, test) separately from the pipeline stages that consume them.","scope":"kody.config.json"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Plans are written to .kody/plans/ with auto-generated names like lively-seeking-clover.md during the build stage.","scope":".kody/plans/"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Hotfix mode skips tests during verify — do not rely on test results for validation in a hotfix pipeline.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
